description: Drupal layout builder block displaying a student profile introductory paragraph as part of a student profile page.

props.intro: Isobel is a dual honours undergraduate student, studying Politics and Modern Languages and Cultures

Bradley is a third-year chemical engineering undergraduate student currently spending a year in design & product development at ITM Power as part of his degree - gaining real-world chemical engineering experience.

stories.name: WithLineBreaks
stories.description: Intro text that spans multiple sentences about a student profile

props.intro: We have many student societies to choose from. We had a chat with the President of the General Engineering Society – Romesa Khawaja – about why they should be your first choice.

notes: The outer div carries Drupal block classes: block, block-layout-builder, and block-field-blocknodestudent-profilefield-stup-intro. The inner element is a div with class leadintro (note: the LeadIntro atom uses a p tag, but the DOM here shows a div). This component hardcodes the block and block-layout-builder classes on the root element.
